# TS9402

**Category:** Extension Methods · **Severity:** Error

## Message

```
registerExtensions expects 2 arguments: (typeName, namespace)
```

## Explanation

registerExtensions() registers methods from a namespace as extensions.

Usage:
  registerExtensions("number", NumberOps);

This makes all functions in NumberOps available as methods on number.

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- generated:end -->
